content.rendered: Kelly drives the cross-functional process of market analysis, monetization of products, evaluation of products’ fitness for ecosystem and go-to-market strategies. He has an MBA from the University of Chicago Graduate School of Business, a Master’s in Electrical Engineering from the University of Florida, and Bachelor’s degrees in Electrical Engineering and Physics from North Carolina State University.
